user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new required certificate, so that certification requirements are tracked for employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Required Certificates screen; When I click Add new certificate and provide the certificate name and authority name; Then the certificate is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view required certificates with their issuing authority, so that I know the source of each certification
acceptance_criteria: Given certificates exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Certificate name and Authority name

user_story: As an HR admin, I want the list to indicate when no certificates are configured, so that I know setup is still pending
acceptance_criteria: Given no certificates have been added; When I view the list; Then a no records to display message is shown
